method: Built Laplace-Lagrange A (eccentricity) and B (nodal) matrices from 8-planet masses and semi-major axes using Murray & Dermott Ch 7 standard formulas. Computed eigenvalues g_j, s_j. Validated against Laskar 2004 published values. Tested whether 8H = 2,682,536 yr emerges as the optimal commensurability period from theoretical eigenfrequencies.
validation_verdict: Laplace-Lagrange code reproduces Laskar 2004 g_j to within 6.9% mean error. Theoretical secular code is validated. The first-principles eigenvalues are correct.
commensurability_verdict: ✗ 8H is NOT singled out by the linear theory (62.4% of T values give lower J). The 8H structure must emerge from nonlinear couplings beyond first-order Laplace-Lagrange.
